title: Software Development Services Agreement - Contract Summary
author: Legal Department

sections.heading: Parties
sections.content: This agreement is between Meridian Technologies Inc. (Service Provider) and Cascade Solutions LLC (Client). The contract was executed on February 28, 2024.

sections.heading: Scope of Work
sections.content: Service Provider agrees to deliver a custom cloud infrastructure platform including API integration, data migration services, and ongoing support as detailed in Exhibit A.

sections.heading: Deliverables
sections.content: All deliverables are subject to Client review and acceptance within 10 business days of delivery. Failure to respond within this period constitutes acceptance.

sections.heading: Payment Terms
sections.content: Total contract value is $125,000 USD payable in four equal installments of $31,250 each at project milestones.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.content: Upon final payment, all custom-developed code and associated IP transfers to Client. Pre-existing IP and general frameworks remain property of Service Provider.

sections.heading: Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice. Client is liable for work completed to termination date plus 15% early termination fee.

key_terms: Dispute Resolution: Binding arbitration in San Francisco, CA
Limitation of Liability: Capped at total contract value
Confidentiality: NDA in effect for 3 years post-termination
Change Orders: Must be approved in writing by both parties
